name: Manufacturing Traceability for Kanban
description: Manufacturing Traceability for Kanban replenishes inventory and predicts PLC signals; applies decision gates and observability; orchestrates via SCADA to reduce scrap.

steps.name: Line Intake
steps.description: Collect, validate and normalize quality records from MES; attach a runId and timestamp for traceability.

steps.name: Planner
steps.description: Execute planner phase for the Planner-Executor pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Executor
steps.description: Execute executor phase for the Planner-Executor pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Defect Detection
steps.description: Defect Detection across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Traceability
steps.description: Traceability across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: In-Process Check
steps.description: In-Process Check across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Production Report
steps.description: Assemble final payload with status, artifacts, KPIs and audit trail; store to QMS; return response JSON for the client.
